ddt:Target.Name: WB56 - M4R - X85
ddt:Target.Description: ESSENCE - WB56 Véhicules : X85 Motorisation : M4R Logiciel : 63C0 Statut : Version Série Co-auteurs : Rémy COUTURIER Tel. : 78869 remy.couturier-renexter@renault.com Fabien L'HONOREY Tel : 71307 fabien.l-honorey@renault.com

Item.Text: Air flow meter low input diagnosis
Air flow meter high input diagnosis
Atmospheric pressure sensor low input diagnosis
Atmospheric pressure sensor high input diagnosis
Intake air temperature sensor low input diagnosis
Intake air temperature sensor high input diagnosis
Coolant temperature sensor low input diagnosis
Coolant temperature sensor high input diagnosis
Front O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Canister purge control solenoid valve open circuit diagnosis
Canister purge control solenoid valve short circuit diagnosis
Invalid or absent vehicle speed / Validation when PARAMx=02
One of brake switch failure OR Both of brake switch infered failure
CC/SL main switch failure OR Steering wheel command switch failure
Neutral switch not good diagnosis or bad communication with USM or TCM
Air flow meter intermediate voltage diagnosis
Throttle motor power source system short circuit failure
Throttle motor power source system open circuit failure
Throttle motor system short circuit failure
Front O2 sensor Lean shift diagnosis (bank 1)
Front O2 sensor Rich shift diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor Lean output failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor Rich output failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Decrease in TPS full closed position learned value
Improper update of TPS full closed position learned value
Detected failure of alternator power information

Data.Name: Radiator fan relay HIGH output - DOMRFH
Radiator fan relay LOW output - DOMRFL
Rapid TAS learning condition experience - FACTAS
Rapid TAS learning condition OK - FQCAL
TPS closed position learning finished - FTVOLNEX

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: DOS shift P-factor compensation value - PHOS
variable inlet duct control solenoid output
VVL solenoid output (common drive for inlet and exhaust)
Test of the cooling gas load

Item.Text: Test conditions satisfied and correct cooling gas load
Test conditions satisfied and incorrect cooling gas load

Data.Name: Water memorised failure
Data.Comment: FLGVSC ; Extracted from NGMEM of TWNG

Data.Name: Water current failure
Data.Comment: FLGVSC ; Extracted from FLGFS of TWNG

Data.Name: Steering wheel control buttons memorised failure
Steering wheel control buttons current failure
Wire connection opened brake switch input (normally closed)
State change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches
State change detection on opened brake switch
State change detection LV position with security on configuration detection
State change detection RV position with security on configuration detection (on-off, off-on)

Item.Text: Assembly line testing and after sales session

diag. byte stored upon last anomalous engine cut off

formatted fuel consumption for Cluster display

Item.Text: Air / Fuel ratio adaptive (adaptatifs de richesse)

Data.Name: cylinder intake air filling up efficiency
variable inlet resonator control solenoid output
Inlet manifold / atmospheric pressure switching solenoid output
Detected failure of alternator power information
Detected Invalid value of the alternator power transmitted by the USM
Memorized Invalid value of the alternator power transmitted by the USM
Detected failure USM fast frame reception
Memorized failure USM fast frame reception
Invalid vehicle speed due to invalid or absent vehicle speed
Present failure counter : invalid value of the alternator power transmitted by the USM
Present failure counter : USM fast frame reception
Present failure: invalid value of Torque consumed by AGB
Memorized failure: invalid value of Torque consumed by AGB
Counter for no information from AT ECU
Failure detected on both pedal tracks
Failure of accelerator pedal safety case N°1 (activates reversible downgraded mode)
Failure of accelerator pedal safety case N°2 (activates irreversible downgraded mode)
Counter of accelerator pedal safety case detected failure N°1 (memorized)
Absolute pressure sensor Open circuit or Short circuit to ground or voltage
Absolute pressure sensor Short circuit at battery + or voltage
Boolean indicating whether status is protected
Connection status with ECU N°1
Data.Comment: CONFMUX ; engine control unit ; only for LPG ECU

Data.Name: Request for no ac compressor change
Combination of all the vehicle inhibitions
AC compressor clutching inhibition due to engine over-speed with too small vehicle speed
Delayed AC compressor inhibition due to engine control conditions
Filtered air conditioning compressor activation request
Fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management
Fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management
One of brake switch memorised failure
One of brake switch current failure
Both of brake switch memorised failure
Both of brake switch current failure

Item.Text: CC and SL disabled, inactive or awaiting

Data.Name: Deactivation due to gearbox limp home
Deactivation due to vehicle speed default
Deactivation due to engine control problem
Deactivation due to CC/SL failure detection
Deactivation due to suspend switch press
Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection
Deactivation because set speed/vehicle speed ratio is incoherent
Identify ECM frame for tool need.
ME1000[1]
Data.Comment: On every 1000 turns, MFCEM max value cylinder 1

Data.Name: ME1000[2]
Data.Comment: On every 1000 turns, MFCEM max value cylinder 2

Data.Name: ME1000[3]
Data.Comment: On every 1000 turns, MFCEM max value cylinder 3

Data.Name: ME1000[4]
Data.Comment: On every 1000 turns, MFCEM max value cylinder 4

Item.Text: mDGNSW[19] - bit(4) : VTC solenoid breakage diagnosis (bank 1)
mDGNSW[24] - bit(0) : Hall crank angle sensor POS sensor momentary-disconnection/noise/tooth breaks off
mDGNSW[24] - bit(1) : Hall crank angle sensor POS sensor start, breakage diagnosis after starting
mDGNSW[24] - bit(2) : Hall crank angle sensor POS sensor start, breakage diagnosis at starting
mDGNSW[24] - bit(3) : Hall crank angle sensor CAM (Phase) sensor, momentary-disconnection/noise/tooth breaks off (bank 1)
mDGNSW[24] - bit(4) : Hall crank angle sensor CAM (Phase) sensor, breakage diagnosis after staring (bank 1)
mDGNSW[24] - bit(5) : Hall crank angle sensor CAM (Phase) sensor, breakage diagnosis at starting (bank 1)
mDGNSW[27] - bit(4) : Operation result collation function diagnosis
mDGNSW[27] - bit(5) : Exercise operation question part diagnosis
mDGNSW[27] - bit(7) : SYNC watch part diagnosis
mDGNSW[32] - bit(1) : Throttle servo error diagnosis
mDGNSW[32] - bit(3) : Throttle target open-degree matching diagnosis
mDGNSW[32] - bit(4) : APO M-S matching diagnosis
mDGNSW[32] - bit(5) : VAPO M-S matching diagnosis
mDGNSW[32] - bit(7) : Throttle F/B control watch diagnosis
mDGNSW[34] - bit(6) : Relay off sticking diagnosis
mDGNSW[34] - bit(7) : Relay on sticking diagnosis
mDGNSW[36] - bit(1) : Task executive periodic diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[36] - bit(2) : S/S/ off system diagnosis
mDGNSW[36] - bit(5) : Throttle open sticking diagnosis
mDGNSW[37] - bit(0) : EEP- ROM reading diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[37] - bit(1) : EEP- ROM writing diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[37] - bit(2) : Timer/clock function diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[37] - bit(3) : WDT function diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[37] - bit(6) : RAM function diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[37] - bit(7) : ROM function diagnosis (the main thing)
mDGNSW[48] - bit(3) : FrO2/S Rich shift diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[48] - bit(5) : FrO2/S Lean shift diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[49] - bit(0) : ISC High rpm diagnosis
mDGNSW[49] - bit(1) : ISC Low rpm diagnosis
mDGNSW[49] - bit(7) : FrO2/S Unusual voltage diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[50] - bit(1) : RrO2/S Unusual voltage diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[50] - bit(3) : RrO2/S Rich output abnormality diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[50] - bit(5) : RrO2/S Lean output abnormality diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[51] - bit(2) : Knock sensor High Input diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[51] - bit(3) : Knock sensor Low Input diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[52] - bit(0) : The ignition the first signal diagnosis
mDGNSW[52] - bit(1) : Mass airflow meter middle electric potential diagnosis
mDGNSW[52] - bit(2) : Mass airflow meter High Input diagnosis
mDGNSW[52] - bit(3) : Mass airflow meter Low Input diagnosis
mDGNSW[53] - bit(2) : Intake air temperature sensor High Input diagnosis
mDGNSW[53] - bit(3) : Intake air temperature sensor Low Input diagnosis
mDGNSW[53] - bit(6) : Coolant temperature sensor High Input diagnosis
mDGNSW[53] - bit(7) : Coolant temperature sensor Low Input diagnosis
mDGNSW[54] - bit(2) : Canister purge control solenoid valve Open diagnosis
mDGNSW[55] - bit(3) : VTC Intake function diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[55] - bit(6) : Fuel system Lean side abnormality diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[55] - bit(7) : Fuel system Rich side abnormality diagnosis (bank1)
mDGNSW[56] - bit(5) : Atmospheric pressure sensor HighInput diagnosis
mDGNSW[56] - bit(6) : Atmospheric pressure sensor LowInput diagnosis
mDGNSW[58] - bit(0) : AVCC system short trouble
mDGNSW[58] - bit(4) : APS2 Low Input trouble
mDGNSW[58] - bit(5) : APS2 High Input trouble
mDGNSW[58] - bit(6) : APS1 Low Input trouble
mDGNSW[58] - bit(7) : APS1 High Input trouble
mDGNSW[59] - bit(0) : TPS full-close learning value renewal is unusual.
mDGNSW[59] - bit(1) : TPS full-close learning value decline
mDGNSW[59] - bit(4) : TPS2 Low Input trouble
mDGNSW[59] - bit(5) : TPS2 High Input trouble
mDGNSW[59] - bit(6) : TPS1 Low Input trouble
mDGNSW[59] - bit(7) : TPS1 High Input trouble
mDGNSW[60] - bit(4) : Throttle motor system short trouble
mDGNSW[60] - bit(6) : Throttle motor power supply system short trouble
mDGNSW[60] - bit(7) : Throttle motor power supply system open trouble
mDGNSW[68] - bit(0) : Air condition pressure sensor failure
mDGNSW[68] - bit(1) : Both of brake switch infered failure
mDGNSW[68] - bit(2) : One of brake switch failure
mDGNSW[68] - bit(3) : Invalid or absent vehicle speed / Validation when PARAMx=02
mDGNSW[68] - bit(4) : Steering wheel command switch failure
mDGNSW[68] - bit(5) : Cru/sl main switch failure
mDGNSW[68] - bit(6) : Confirmed failure of accelerator pedal
mDGNSW[68] - bit(7) : Detected failure of alternator power information
mDGNSW[69] - bit(0) : Rear O2 Heater VB-short
mDGNSW[69] - bit(1) : Front O2 Heater VB-short
mDGNSW[69] - bit(2) : Canister purge control solenoid valve Short diagnosis
mDGNSW[69] - bit(7) : Failure detected: clutch switch
mDGNSW[71] - bit(0) : #1 cylinder injector circuit low failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(1) : #2 cylinder injector circuit low failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(2) : #3 cylinder injector circuit low failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(3) : #4 cylinder injector circuit low failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(4) : #1 cylinder injector circuit high failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(5) : #2 cylinder injector circuit high failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(6) : #3 cylinder injector circuit high failure
mDGNSW[71] - bit(7) : #4 cylinder injector circuit high failure

Display.DataName: Detected failure of alternator power information
Detected Invalid value of the alternator power transmitted by the USM
Memorized Invalid value of the alternator power transmitted by the USM
Detected failure USM fast frame reception
Memorized failure USM fast frame reception
Invalid vehicle speed due to invalid or absent vehicle speed
Present failure counter : invalid value of the alternator power transmitted by the USM
Present failure counter : USM fast frame reception

Absolute pressure sensor Open circuit or Short circuit to ground or voltage

Boolean indicating whether status is protected
diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte stored upon last anomalous engine cut off
formatted fuel consumption for tuning needs
formatted fuel consumption for Cluster display
